description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, bulging body constructed from vertical wooden staves. The staves are tightly bound by five evenly spaced, metallic hoops that encircle the barrel, providing structural reinforcement and a rustic appearance. The wood grain is visible, with natural knots and subtle color variations, giving the barrel an authentic, weathered look. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood, with the top slightly recessed within the uppermost metal hoop. The metal bands show signs of wear and slight rust, suggesting outdoor or long-term use. There are no visible handles, spigots, or markings, and the barrel appears to be sealed with a solid lid.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, featuring a bulging cylindrical shape and a solid, flat lid. The wood grain and weathered metal bands give it a rustic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the front, showing the wood grain, five metal hoops, and a solid, flat lid with no visible markings or handles.
description_view_1: This view highlights the curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metal hoops, with the wood grain and lid clearly visible.
description_view_2: From this angle, a small wooden plug or knot is visible on one stave, adding detail to the otherwise uniform surface.
description_view_3: This side view shows the continuous wood grain and metal hoops, with no additional features or markings visible.
